landing.descriptionBefore: Pros who spoil the ending, noobs who can't even craft a pickaxe, teammates who quit after two weeks and leave you alone in the world... GameMate matches you with players at
landing.descriptionStrong: your exact skill level and commitment
landing.descriptionAfter: so you can finally enjoy the game the way it's meant to be played.

level.title: No spoilers
level.desc: Filtered by real skill. Everyone's at the same point. No one rushing ahead and ruining the experience.

rules.title: No clueless noobs
rules.desc: Level is declared and verified by the community with badges. No more teammates who can't craft a pickaxe.

reputation.title: No quitters
reputation.desc: Commitment reputation visible on every profile. Two-week quitters have it on their record for everyone to see.

landing.badgesNote: Only awarded when 15 or more players have confirmed them
landing.footer: Made by a gamer, for gamers. 0 corporate, 100% community.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to find your next gaming crew
login.registered: Account created successfully. You can now log in.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join the community and find players at your level
register.name: Name
register.usernameHint: Lowercase, numbers and _ only (no spaces or capitals)
register.phoneHint: International format (e.g. +34612345678). Ensures each account belongs to a real person — keeps the community healthy.
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase and one number
register.terms: By signing up you agree not to engage in any harassment or toxic behavior. Users with bad conduct will be banned.

parties.title: Open parties

empty.title: Nobody has created a party here yet
empty.subtitle: Be the first. Others will show up after.

parties.waiting: {count, plural, one {# party} other {# parties}} waiting for players

createParty.title: Create party
createParty.subtitle: Set up your gaming group. You can have between 2 and 6 players.

fields.name: Party name
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us more about how you want to play...
fields.serverInfoHint: You can add this after creating the party

rules.subtitle: Required rules always apply. Pick the optional ones you want and add your own.
rules.optional: Optional — check the ones you want to include

partyDetail.chatEmpty: Nobody has written anything yet. Say hi! 👋
partyDetail.chatJoinFirst: Join the party to access the group chat
partyDetail.confirmLeave: Are you sure you want to leave the party?
partyDetail.confirmClose: Close the party? Members won't be able to join anymore.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.noRatings: Nobody has rated you yet. Play more games!

criteria.levelMatchDesc: Did their level match what they declared?
criteria.funFactorDesc: Was it fun playing with them?
criteria.reliabilityDesc: Were they consistent and did they give notice if they couldn't connect?

gameProfile.notesPlaceholder: Tell us something more about how you play...

kickVote.title: Kick proposals
kickVote.deadlineNote: Members who don't vote within 3 days count as 'yes'

joinRequest.title: Join requests
joinRequest.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what you want to do and who you're looking for... (optional)

milestone.title: Current progress
milestone.banner: This game is already in progress. Here's how far they've gotten:
